title: 1983 Amendments to the International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea (SOLAS), 1974. (Resolution Nos. MSC 4. (48), 5 (48), and 6 (48), [1096]). Amendments to chapters II 1, II 2, III, IV and VII of the Convention, including the International Code for the Construction and Equipment of Ships carrying Dangerous Chemicals in Bulk (IBC Code) and the ICC Code.
subject: INTERNATIONAL MARITIME ORGANIZATION (IMCO/IMO)
